rows.content: The following fields allow you to define input and output formats
for files with extensions that match the profile name.
PROFILE NAME+- The name of the profile.  This name must match an
existing file extension if it is to be applied automatically when a
file of that type is loaded.  Names that do not exactly match a
particular file extension may be applied by filling in the PROFILE
field of the EDIT ENTRY PANEL.  For reference, FAT file systems
limit file extensions to three characters; HPFS file systems have no
RECORD FORMAT+ This field indicates the input record format.
D (DATA-DELIMITED)+- This is the standard file format.  It is
also the SPF/PC default. The input file will be read and parsed
into logical records at CR/LF (or other specified) record
